stemHtml:
An aircraft is cleared to descend to 4 000 ft. During descent, the pilot forgets to reset the altimeter to local QNH 1 030 at the Transition Level. He/she levels off at 4 000 ft and maintains that level. What is the difference between the aircraft and other traffic at 4 000 ft? The aircraft is...
(Barometric lapse rate: 27 ft/hPa)
